mapper.sql: id, user_no, phone, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, user_type, real_name, id_verify_status, developer_status, skill_tags, intro, rating, completed_order_count, status, last_login_at, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update `user` set last_login_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `user` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
